description: Composition Green printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has a round slit neck with a yoke, three-quarter sleeves, laced pin tucks on the yoke and cuffs, and has a vented hem Fitting Regular Wash care Wash cold using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations This elegant kurta from vishudh speaks volumes of your class and exudes femininity with its timeless design and cut. The traditional print coupled with the pretty lace work is sure to make this a wardrobe favourite. Pair it with leggings and skinny jeans. Model statistics The model wears size M in kurtas Height: 5'7" Chest: 33" Waist: 25"
